reviews.comment:
Falta de personal atendiendo la islas, por lo menos en temporada, cargar combustible y tomar algo, te lleva una hora no recomendable

(Translated by Google)
There's a lack of staff serving the islands, at least during peak season; refueling and getting something to eat takes an hour, which isn't recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURobWJITmxBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Mucha gente, hay esperar para cargar combustible, los baños muy sucios y deteriorados.

(Translated by Google)
Lots of people, you have to wait to refuel, the bathrooms are very dirty and run down.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoNmFmSTR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Es muy extraño que, siempre que corresponde la Promoción Infinia, como en el día de hoy (11/03/23), se "caiga el sistema" y no se pueda pagar con la aplicación de YPF con la que se obtiene un 10% de descuento adicional al 5% que otorga el ACA... Muy sugestivo... Ya me ocurrió dos veces. O es mí mala suerte o hay "perro"... 🐕

(Translated by Google)
It's very strange that, whenever the Infinia Promotion is due, like today (March 11, 2023), the system crashes and I can't pay with the YPF app, which gives me an additional 10% discount on top of the 5% offered by the ACA... Very suspicious... It's happened to me twice already. Either I'm just unlucky or something's fishy going on... 🐕
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoeWRfUWtBRRAB
